data.body: Investigated: This is a platform limitation — the Agent tool only supports built-in agent types. CLAUDE.md already documents the fallback: 'On dispatch failure, read plugins/dso/agents/<agent-name>.md inline'. The fix is ensuring all skill files that dispatch named agents include explicit fallback logic. This affects: fix-bug (intent-search, bot-psychologist), sprint (completion-verifier, red-test-writer), brainstorm (feasibility-reviewer), preplanning (red-team-reviewer, blue-team-filter). Each skill file needs a try-dispatch-then-fallback-to-inline pattern.
